response.justification: The role demands 5–10 years of strong hands-on C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, and fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge. The candidate's career is overwhelmingly DLang, Node.js, and TypeScript web/mobile work; C++ exposure is limited and dated (LabWindows/CVI components and a university thesis), with no Windows financial-systems development. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL) and no fixed-income, derivatives, or investment-banking domain background. Strong communication and craftsmanship signals do not offset the core technical and domain mismatch.
strengths: Demonstrated communication skills via talks, workshops, and courses
Broad full-stack engineering experience and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Some genuine C/C++ background (LabWindows/CVI, audio thesis)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated; no recent Windows C++ work
No SQL Server or Oracle; lacks fixed-income/capital-markets domain knowledge
Primary stack (DLang, Node, TypeScript) misaligned with role requirements

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
